title: Redesign Pipeline Steps

triage.rationale: Redesign brainstorm, audit, casting, and DOD pipeline steps to be more deliberative and mechanically enforceable

dod: Brainstorm fires on all heavyweight + strategic directives, with deliberation for strategic only
Audit split into Investigator (pure data) + Architect (design) as two agents
Auditor upgraded from haiku to opus
validate-cast.sh mechanically checks casting rules after Morgan's plan
DOD enforcement in Stop hook blocks if any initiative has unmet DOD criteria
SKILL.md routing table updated with all new docs
All changes in SKILL.md, agent definitions, hook scripts, and pipeline docs
